scope: One accessible derived CSV capture containing Health, Spooky2, frequency-protocol and related historical user-request records.

source.reason_not_committed: Large historical text source may contain sensitive health and personal material. The manifest stores counts, lineage and hash only.

known_limits: This is a keyword-derived and project-labelled historical capture, not the complete health source universe.
Some records are cross-domain false positives or context records and require semantic classification.
The raw 7Z source was not re-expanded during this bounded counting step.
Attachments, screenshots, manuals, device files and File Library items require separate manifests.
No clinical validity or device compatibility is implied by record inclusion.
required_next_passes: classify each row as requirement, evidence, assistant claim, historical instruction, conflict, duplicate or irrelevant
link assistant responses to originating user requests
create exact and semantic duplicate groups
separate medical evidence from manufacturer, community, symbolic and unsupported claims
extract emergency, contraindication, device, privacy, consent and approval requirements
map accepted requirements to Jarvis-Health artifacts, tests and evidence
run independent QA on counts and source coordinates
rollback: Revert this manifest if the counted artifact or hash is disproven. Preserve the prior record and add a supersession link rather than deleting history.
